rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §28.0021, which governs personal financial literacy curriculum requirements for school districts.
quote: The Texas essential knowledge and skills and, as applicable, Section 28.025 shall include instruction in personal financial literacy
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns K-12 financial literacy curriculum, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
